_comment: Controls how emailed newsletters become sources. Each group matches a sender by domain (match_domain, substring of the From address domain) OR by name (match_name, substring of the From display name, case-insensitive). First match wins. id = source id; name = display name; category = 'author' (Experts page) or 'publication' (Publications page). Senders that match nothing become one source per sender (category publication). Bump _v in fetch_newsletters to force a clean re-ingest after editing.
